flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Dayton fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (8.6k → 7.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Dayton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Dayton are 42% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($75.5k vs $53.2k).
